sections.paragraph:
Original: ממזר

Transliteration: mamzêr

Phonetic: mam-zare'

BDB Definition:

  1. bastard, child of incest, illegitimate child
    1. bastard
    2. mixed population (figuratively)
    3. born of a Jewish father and a heathen mother or visa versa

Origin: from an unused root meaning to alienate

TWOT entry: 1174a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
